Medial Axis Transform

Drawing Mode: Click to add vertices (min 3). Click first vertex to close.
Zoom: 1.00x

Visualizer Dashboard

⚙

Shape Presets

Cross
Y-Shape
Sq. Donut
Circ. Donut
Pentagon
Branched Tree
Custom

MAT Parameters ▼

Samples per Edge 25
Bisection Precision 1e-5

Display Overlays

Show Medial Axis Draws the computed skeleton points
Simplify Medial Axis Straighten branches (valence 3 to valence 1)
Node Merge Distance 2.0m

Structural Workflow

Draw Structural Ribs Draws perpendicular columns/ribs to boundary
Prune Corner Branches Deletes edges connecting corners to internal nodes
Rib Spacing (m) 5.0m
Show Structural Bays Draws enclosed cells as structural spaces
Edit Bays Mode Click cells in viewport to select them

Interactive Helpers

Interactive Circles Hover near axis to see maximal inscribed discs
Render Governors Draw vectors linking center to tangency points

Rhino 3DM Integration

Interactive Visualizer Tips:

Click and drag vertices to modify shapes in real-time. Hover over the medial axis to see the maximal inscribed circle sweep.
